C:\Users\yan\scoop\apps\cmake\current\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\bench.dir/objects.a
C:\Users\yan\scoop\apps\mingw-mstorsjo-llvm-ucrt\current\bin\llvm-ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\bench.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\bench.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Users\yan\scoop\apps\mingw-mstorsjo-llvm-ucrt\current\bin\clang++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\bench.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o bench.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libbench.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\bench.dir\linkLibs.rsp
